# Copilot instructions — Fallout

This repository uses **[AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md)** at the repo root as the
canonical brief for all AI coding tools — project layout, semver/calendar
versioning policy, PR-creation flow, conventions, the what-not-to-do list, and
useful pointers.

**Read `AGENTS.md` first, and defer to it.** Unlike some tools, Copilot does
not expand file imports, so this file is a pointer rather than a copy — keeping
the rules in one place (AGENTS.md) is deliberate, so they can't drift out of
sync. Do not re-state AGENTS.md rules here.

For writing issues and PR descriptions specifically, follow
[docs/agents/issue-and-pr-style.md](../docs/agents/issue-and-pr-style.md):
terse, scannable, no filler.
